keyEvents.text: Kendall Waston (Costa Rica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Costa Rica 1, Nicaragua 0. Alonso Martínez (Costa Rica) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Manfred Ugalde with a headed pass.
Goal! Costa Rica 1, Nicaragua 1. Junior Arteaga (Nicaragua) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Bancy Hernández.
Goal! Costa Rica 2, Nicaragua 1. Alonso Martínez (Costa Rica) right footed shot from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by Kendall Waston with a headed pass following a corner.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Guillermo Villalobos replaces Aaron Murillo because of an injury.
Christian Reyes (Nicaragua) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Costa Rica 2, Nicaragua 1.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Óscar Acevedo replaces Christian Reyes.
Goal! Costa Rica 3, Nicaragua 1. Manfred Ugalde (Costa Rica) left footed shot from outside the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Alonso Martínez.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Byron Bonilla replaces Emmanuel Gómez.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Allan Cruz replaces Alonso Martínez.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Marlon López replaces Ariel Arauz.
Substitution, Nicaragua. Widman Talavera replaces Junior Arteaga.

Substitution, Costa Rica. Andy Rojas replaces Kenneth Vargas.
